payload.answer: Three atomic memory cards compiled: durable source evidence requirement, atomic card size/traceability principle, and semantic index recommendation with database ownership constraint.
citations: AI memory systems need durable source evidence
Atomic memory cards should be small and traceable
A semantic index can improve recall, but the application database must own lifecycle and conflict state
payload.decision: extract three atomic memory cards with traceable source evidence and semantic indexing readiness

entity_resolution.reason: All entities are explicitly named and unambiguous in input; no resolution needed.

details: All input statements processed into atomic memory cards.
Each card is traceable to source input.
No superseded or deleted facts presented.
Ambiguity preserved where input lacked specificity (e.g., 'can improve' confidence medium).
Entity resolution not required; all names are explicit.
